summary: Frontend-only verification pass for content updates and complete GitHub removal on https://zeel-craft.preview.emergentagent.com. Ran a single comprehensive Playwright suite (44 assertions) covering hero, resume button behavior, about photo, experience timeline, featured projects + slugs, project detail pages, web/coursework iframes, command palette, education, contact, and theme toggle. All 44 checks passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Navbar.jsx still contains dead 'Resume coming soon' toast fallback branch (downloadResume). Harmless since profile.resumeUrl is set, but can be removed for cleanliness.

WebProjectCard embeds external GitHub Pages sites in iframes; those third-party pages emit their own console errors (Bing Maps invalid credentials, DiceGame's React class= warning, geolocation policy). Not portfolio bugs but consider adding sandbox attribute to silence noise: sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin".
Cloudflare RUM beacon (/cdn-cgi/rum) returns ERR_ABORTED on every page load — env/infra noise, not app code.
test_credentials: None — frontend-only static site, no auth.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 fully validated the GitHub-removal + content-update pass. All 5 project detail pages were visited and confirmed to have no project-github/project-demo buttons but working project-back and project-next. Web & coursework section: 6 cards each with a real <iframe> pointing to zeel-hub.github.io (verified href + iframe src on all 6). Command palette items: 7 nav, 5 projects, theme/resume/linkedin/email, NO github. Theme toggle confirmed (dark<->light html class change). Resume button (nav resume-button) and hero-download-resume both open the PDF URL in a new tab via window.open (verified via window.open monkey patch). No 'coming soon' toast emitted. Console errors observed are exclusively from third-party iframe content (Bing Maps API, DiceGame react warnings) — none from portfolio code.
